title: Task assigned and completed:
excerpt:
Hi! Monday team 
I want to know how many tasks are done by specific person in a certain time frame. I want to do this by formula.

posts.author: Fareeha (Mughal)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi! Monday team
I want to know how many tasks are done by specific person in a certain time frame. I want to do this by formula.

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Fareeha !

Unfortunately I do not think what you are asking for is currently possibe.

However, I think you might be well served by the My Work feature, which allows you to see all items assigned to someone and also filter them by status and date.

image1200×562 68.8 KB

Let me know if this helps!

Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: Aedrei (aedrei)
posts.cookedHtml: Reopening this to confirm that this would be incredibly helpful to manage productivity across workspaces.
